title: Three more ships struck in the Persian Gulf as Iran warns of oil prices hitting $200
summary_full: The latest incidents in or near the Strait of Hormuz come shortly after Iran warned the world to prepare for $200 oil prices.
summary_public: The latest incidents in or near the Strait of Hormuz come shortly after Iran warned the world to prepare for $200 oil prices.
